en: Unlock the Outpost (above) to access its functions.
zh: 先解锁前哨站(上方)才能使用其功能。

en: Choose the ascension difficulty for your next run. Higher difficulty means tougher enemies.
zh: 选择下一局的进阶难度。难度越高

en: Reach Outpost Tier 2 to upgrade safe cells.
zh: 升级前哨站至 T2 才能强化安全格。

en: Reach Outpost Tier 3 to edit your starter deck.
zh: 升级前哨站至 T3 才能编辑初始牌组。

en: Select a hero first to edit a starter deck.
Current deck (click a card to replace):
zh: 当前牌组(点击卡牌进行替换):

en: Save to apply this deck to the hero's future runs (up to 2 swaps).
zh: 保存后,此牌组将应用于该英雄今后的征程(最多替换 2 张)。

en: Saved. This deck will be used in the hero's next run.
zh: 已保存。此牌组将用于该英雄的下一局征程。
